options.content:
## Safety & Policy
Privacy posture, permission mode, content capture signals, and policy friction.

azureLogAnalytics.query: union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot' or Message has 'github.copilot' | extend conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.input.messages' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.output.messages' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.tool.call.arguments' or tostring(Properties) has 'gen_ai.tool.call.result' | summarize Signals=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | summarize AllowAll=max(toint(tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.allow_all']) == 'true')) by conversation, bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | summarize Sessions=sum(AllowAll) by TimeGenerated | order by TimeGenerated asc

union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot' or Message has 'github.copilot' | extend conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where tostring(Properties) has 'preToolUse' or Message has 'AgentOps preToolUse policy' | summarize Blocks=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.remote']) == 'enabled' | summarize Sessions=dcount(conversation) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

// Policy and governance posture for Copilot CLI AgentOps.
// Uses privacy-safe AgentOps resource attributes from the shim plus documented
// Copilot runtime events. No prompt, response, tool argument, or URL content is required.
let lookback = 7d;
let session_id = (props:dynamic, timestamp:datetime) {
    case(
        isnotempty(tostring(props["gen_ai.conversation.id"])),
        tostring(props["gen_ai.conversation.id"]),
        isnotempty(tostring(props["github.copilot.interaction_id"])),
        tostring(props["github.copilot.interaction_id"]),
        strcat(
            tostring(props["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
            "_",
            tostring(props["github.copilot.turn_count"]),
            "_",
            format_datetime(bin(timestamp, 1h), "yyyyMMdd_HHmm")
        )
    )
};
let sessions =
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where Properties has "github.copilot" and Properties has "github-copilot-cli"
| extend
    session = session_id(Properties, TimeGenerated),
    operation = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.operation.name"]),
    model = coalesce(tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.model"]), tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"])),
    mode = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.mode"]),
    remote = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.remote"]),
    output_format = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.output_format"]),
    allow_all = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.allow_all"]) == "true",
    acp = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.acp"]) == "true",
    cwd_changed = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.cwd_changed"]) == "true",
    session_id_provided = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.session_id_provided"]) == "true",
    share = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.share"]) == "true",
    share_gist = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.share_gist"]) == "true",
    stream = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.stream"]),
    reasoning_effort = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.reasoning_effort"]),
    allow_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.allow_tool.count"]),
    deny_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.deny_tool.count"]),
    available_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.available_tools.count"]),
    excluded_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.excluded_tools.count"]),
    secret_env_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.secret_env_vars.count"]),
    attachment_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.attachment.count"]),
    plugin_dir_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.plugin_dir.count"]),
    additional_mcp_config_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.additional_mcp_config.count"]),
    disabled_mcp_server_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.disabled_mcp_server.count"]),
    github_mcp_tool_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.github_mcp_tool.count"]),
    github_mcp_toolset_count = toint(Properties["agentops.cli.github_mcp_toolset.count"]),
    content_capture = isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.input.messages"]))
        or isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.output.messages"]))
        or isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.tool.call.arguments"]))
        or isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.tool.call.result"])),
    error = tostring(Properties["error.type"])
| summarize
    started = min(TimeGenerated),
    ended = max(TimeGenerated),
    spans = count(),
    failures = countif(Success == false or isnotempty(error)),
    allow_all = max(toint(allow_all)),
    allow_rules = max(allow_count),
    deny_rules = max(deny_count),
    available_tool_filters = max(available_count),
    excluded_tool_filters = max(excluded_count),
    secret_env_redactions = max(secret_env_count),
    attachments = max(attachment_count),
    plugin_dirs = max(plugin_dir_count),
    additional_mcp_configs = max(additional_mcp_config_count),
    disabled_mcp_servers = max(disabled_mcp_server_count),
    github_mcp_tools = max(github_mcp_tool_count),
    github_mcp_toolsets = max(github_mcp_toolset_count),
    acp_enabled = max(toint(acp)),
    changed_working_directory = max(toint(cwd_changed)),
    provided_session_id = max(toint(session_id_provided)),
    shared_markdown = max(toint(share)),
    shared_gist = max(toint(share_gist)),
    content_capture_signals = countif(content_capture),
    modes = make_set_if(mode, isnotempty(mode), 5),
    models = make_set_if(model, isnotempty(model), 5),
    remote_states = make_set_if(remote, isnotempty(remote), 3),
    output_formats = make_set_if(output_format, isnotempty(output_format), 3),
    streams = make_set_if(stream, isnotempty(stream), 3),
    reasoning_efforts = make_set_if(reasoning_effort, isnotempty(reasoning_effort), 5)
    by session;
let events =
union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where tostring(Properties) has "github.copilot" or Message has "github.copilot"
| extend
    session = session_id(Properties, TimeGenerated),
    event = coalesce(tostring(Properties["event.name"]), tostring(Properties["github.copilot.event.name"]), Name),
    message = tostring(Message)
| summarize
    policy_blocks = countif(message has "AgentOps preToolUse policy" or event has "permission" or event has "policy"),
    hook_errors = countif(event == "github.copilot.hook.error" or event has "hook.error"),
    aborts = countif(event == "github.copilot.session.abort"),
    exceptions = countif(event == "exception")
    by session;
sessions
| join kind=leftouter events on session
| extend
    policy_blocks = coalesce(policy_blocks, 0),
    hook_errors = coalesce(hook_errors, 0),
    aborts = coalesce(aborts, 0),
    exceptions = coalesce(exceptions, 0),
    risk = case(
        content_capture_signals > 0, "content_capture",
        allow_all > 0, "allow_all",
        shared_gist > 0, "shared_gist",
        additional_mcp_configs > 0 or plugin_dirs > 0, "session_extension",
        acp_enabled > 0, "acp_server",
        policy_blocks > 0, "policy_blocked",
        hook_errors > 0 or exceptions > 0, "policy_runtime_error",
        deny_rules > 0 or excluded_tool_filters > 0, "restricted",
        "normal"
    )
| project
    started,
    ended,
    session,
    risk,
    modes,
    models,
    remote_states,
    output_formats,
    streams,
    reasoning_efforts,
    allow_all = allow_all > 0,
    acp_enabled = acp_enabled > 0,
    changed_working_directory = changed_working_directory > 0,
    provided_session_id = provided_session_id > 0,
    shared_markdown = shared_markdown > 0,
    shared_gist = shared_gist > 0,
    allow_rules,
    deny_rules,
    available_tool_filters,
    excluded_tool_filters,
    secret_env_redactions,
    attachments,
    plugin_dirs,
    additional_mcp_configs,
    disabled_mcp_servers,
    github_mcp_tools,
    github_mcp_toolsets,
    content_capture_signals,
    policy_blocks,
    hook_errors,
    aborts,
    exceptions,
    failures,
    spans
| order by started desc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']) | where isnotempty(model) | distinct model | order by model asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where isnotempty(operation) | distinct operation | order by operation asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | distinct agent | order by agent asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where isnotempty(repo) | distinct repo | order by repo asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) | where isnotempty(tool) | distinct tool | order by tool asc
